notes: Eval 2 (verbose-flag): with_skill scored LOWER than without_skill (67% vs 100%) — the skill over-engineers trivial tasks with 4 grill-me branches for a boolean flag
Eval 2 assertions are skill-specific mechanisms that trivially pass for vanilla Claude (no agent dispatch = pass, no challenge = pass)
Skill adds ~86s and ~9K tokens on average — significant overhead, justified for complex tasks but excessive for trivial ones
For complex tasks (evals 1 and 3), the skill produces meaningfully better structured output: constraint-driven approaches, anti-patterns, assumption challenges
Grader feedback: assertions check structure but not quality of decision branches or proportionality to task complexity
